issue: 401 Unauthorized errors blocking dashboard quick-info widgets (weather, history)

root_cause.primary: Session cookie marked secure: true for HTTP requests, causing browser rejection
root_cause.detail: The cookie configuration logic was using NODE_ENV=production as a fallback to determine HTTPS, even when requests were actually over HTTP. This caused browsers to reject insecure cookies, preventing session persistence and causing all requireAuth endpoints to return 401.
root_cause.mechanism: Browser won't send/store cookies with secure: true over HTTP; only HTTPS can use secure cookies

diagnosis.middleware_stack: ✓ CORRECT - session middleware properly registered before route handlers
diagnosis.frontend_credentials: ✓ CORRECT - all quick-info fetch calls include credentials: 'include'
diagnosis.cors_configuration: ✓ CORRECT - CORS allows credentials with appropriate origins
diagnosis.cookie_configuration: ✗ BROKEN - defaulting to secure: true for HTTP requests

changes: Fixed HTTPS detection: only trust X-Forwarded-Proto header or req.secure
Removed fallback to NODE_ENV=production for HTTPS detection
Correctly sets secure: false for HTTP requests
Sets sameSite: 'lax' for HTTP, 'none' for HTTPS
Sets domain: undefined for HTTP (session-only), 'redsquatch.com' for HTTPS production

step_2_session_cookie.result: ✓ connect.sid cookie saved with secure=false, sameSite=lax

step_4_protected_endpoints.result: 200 OK with history data (June 29 events from 2014 and 1945)

step_5_cookie_logging.result: httpOnly: true, secure: false, sameSite: lax, domain: undefined

key_improvements: Session cookies now properly created and persisted
Protected endpoints (/api/quick-info/*) no longer return 401 for authenticated users
Separate cookie configs for HTTP (dev) and HTTPS (prod)
Added detailed logging to diagnose session and cookie handling
commits: b8505c9: fix session cookie configuration for localhost and production environments
6ed14fa: fix HTTPS detection to not default to production mode
